## Summary

-

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` (if docs changed)
- [ ] Manual CLI smoke checks (if behavior changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] Backward compatibility reviewed
- [ ] Docs/README updated where needed
- [ ] Tests added or updated for changed behavior
- [ ] No secrets or private data included
